overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Administrative Policy Committee was scheduled to meet to review financial reports, consider budget adjustments for the municipal garage and bike path sealing project, and approve the 2027 budget timetable and 2026-2027 revaluation schedule.

agenda.item: Approval of June 15, 2026 Administrative Policy Committee Meeting Minutes

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and approve the minutes from the previous Administrative Policy Committee meeting held on June 15, 2026.
The committee was set to receive a report from the Finance Director/Treasurer on the village's financial status and related matters.
The committee was expected to consider and adopt the timetable for development and approval of the 2027 municipal budget.
The committee was scheduled to review and establish the timetable for the property revaluation process covering 2026-2027.
The committee was set to discuss and take action on a budget adjustment related to the municipal garage operations or maintenance.
The committee was expected to review the financial statements and budget status report as of June 30, 2026, to assess the village's fiscal position midyear.
The committee was scheduled to discuss a bike path sealing project for the village.
The committee was set to consider a budget adjustment related to funding or expenses for the bike path sealing project.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda, limited to 15 minutes total with three minutes per person, at the discretion of the Chief Presiding Officer.
actionItems: Scheduled to vote on approval of June 15, 2026 meeting minutes
Expected to adopt the 2027 budget timetable
Expected to adopt the 2026-2027 revaluation timetable
Scheduled to vote on Budget Adjustment #3 for the municipal garage
Scheduled to vote on Budget Adjustment #4 for bike path sealing
title: Revised Administrative Policy Committee Meeting - 2026-07-21
